headline: American Express and STAUD Launch Limited-Edition Collection to Celebrate 60 Years of the Gold Card
summary: NEW YORK, March 26, 2026--In celebration of the American Express® Gold Card’s 60th anniversary, American Express has partnered with STAUD on a limited-edition resortwear collection inspired by modern travel and the experiences that define the Gold Card. The eight-piece collection, including select unisex styles, is available starting today on staud.clothing and in stores.
